subject: config seg aai resources and traversal
commit_message:
config seg aai resources and traversal

Issue-ID: OOM-658
Change-Id: I8878f202147edc419341fdc3bdafeb1ebc2eec1c
Signed-off-by: mayankg2703 <mayank.gupta@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

In aai/resources there are different components with conf/logback.xml:
resources/model-loader/conf/logback.xml
resources/search-data-service/conf/logback.xml
resources/sparky-be/conf/logback.xml
resources/traversal/conf/logback.xml
resources/resources/conf/logback.xml
In this case traversal and resources need to move under resources/config somewhere.

Patch Set 1:

> In aai/resources there are different components with
 > conf/logback.xml:
 > resources/model-loader/conf/logback.xml
 > resources/search-data-service/conf/logback.xml
 > resources/sparky-be/conf/logback.xml
 > resources/traversal/conf/logback.xml
 > resources/resources/conf/logback.xml
 > In this case traversal and resources need to move under
 > resources/config somewhere.

Hi Borislav,

please find bellow JIRA for alignment of all logback files.

https://jira.onap.org/browse/OOM-666

Thanks,
Mayank Gupta

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2 Verified+1
